text:
Six PRs merged this week. We swapped out the binary reasoning toggle for proper fast/balanced/pro modes for image generation. DeepSeek V4 is now live via DeepInfra. Audio generation finally has a seed parameter, meaning deterministic caching actually works now (no more random variations when you want the exact same sound). Also added TimeMachine Chat, and cleaned up the usage dashboard so you can actually see your tier and quotas without guessing. Build something weird with it. Code is open, as always. 🌱

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #deepseek #generativeai #webdev
